_meta.description: Management Trust scores (/10) from the forensic 5-pillar framework. Weights: Promoter Profile 20%, Ownership Behaviour 25%, Capital Allocation 20%, Governance 20%, Execution 15%. Evidence-based from BSE/NSE filings, shareholding patterns, screener.in. Detailed findings in prompt_outputs/management_trust_findings.md

promoter_profile.reason: Founder Dr. Devi Shetty — renowned cardiac surgeon, long clean tenure, strong professional reputation.

ownership_behaviour.reason: Promoter stable ~63% (63.85%→63.27%), no pledging; minimal, orderly dilution.

capital_allocation.reason: ROCE ~20%, disciplined expansion (incl. Cayman), consistent ~19% dividend payout; some debt rise for capex.

governance.reason: Clean disclosures, well-regarded board, no SEBI/audit red flags.

execution.reason: ~56% 5-yr PAT CAGR, margins expanded to ~22%, consistent delivery.

NH.summary: High-trust, founder-led healthcare franchise with clean governance, stable promoter holding and strong, consistent execution. Main watch: rising borrowings for the Cayman/India expansion.

promoter_profile.reason: Now PE-controlled (CVC Capital/Aceso) after founder Dr. BS Ajaikumar reduced; professional but control changed hands.

governance.reason: CDSCO suspended HCG Bangalore KR ethics committee for 24 months over clinical-trial review lapses (Jun-2026) — a real regulatory/governance flag.

execution.reason: Revenue grows but profitability weak and volatile; oncology centres slow to break even.

execution.reason: Strong ~60% 5-yr PAT CAGR, but thin EMS margins and working-capital days rose 34→101.
